Notes / Memories: George Clinton lent some gravitas mid-jam to Constance Hauman and Blu Eye Extinction during their opening set on NYE. Greg Thomas jammed through the countdown on sax and Parliament gave us an Auld Lang Syne while balloons dropped from the ceiling.
